summary: Read and analyzed the full local improvement-plan Markdown file at <machine-local-path> (1).md. Verified SHA-256 exactly matches 4B8C7447D4048781935EC7D8B8223112953941BEB4060AA0661AD6D298AE4DE7. Focused analysis on P1-07 through P1-16 and P2-17, including implementation map, dependencies/order, likely bottlenecks, and verdict. No requested files were edited.
decisions: Treat the document as the authoritative source for this analysis because its SHA-256 matched the expected value.
Limit work to read-only analysis; no implementation or repository/source file edits were performed.
Frame P1-11 as a cross-cutting UI/proof gate inherited by all P0/P1 rows, not as an isolated frontend package.
Note P1-16 task lifecycle as a late-sequenced package in the document but a practical shared-schema dependency for finish/evidence integrity across many gates.
next_steps: If implementation begins later, start with the documented P0 prerequisites, then P1-13 and P1-14 live blockers before backlog/job/behavior work.
Consider introducing shared status/proof and task-lifecycle schemas early to reduce later retrofit across P1-07 through P1-16.
